hero.title: Discover a new way to live the role-playing game!

custom.name: OUR 3 PACKS
custom.description: Each of our offers is specially designed for the most epic adventures.

legendary.name: LEGENDARY PACK
legendary.description: For experienced game masters seeking maximum power.

aventurer.name: ADVENTURER PACK
aventurer.description: The best pack for the best experience. Simply.

howWorks.description1: The Char is the unique currency of Chariot, which allows you to access all the features “inside the game” of the application. On Chariot, the principle is simple.
howWorks.description2: To run a 5-player session, you could spend 1 char each, or one player could pay 5 chars so everyone can play. On Chariot, everyone organizes themselves as they wish.

features.title: THE FEATURES
features.description: Everything you need to live a smooth adventure.

feature1.title: Smooth player management
feature1.description1: Centralize character cards, inventories, rolls and states in a single space.
feature1.description2: Each player advances without friction, while the game remains perfectly readable for everyone.

feature2.title: Narrative toolkit for GMs
feature2.description1: Create, organize and improvise your scenarios in real time.
feature2.description2: NPCs, locations, plots and events are at a click's reach to maintain pace and feed immersion.

feature3.title: Simplified initiative and combat
feature3.description1: Automate turns, follow actions and visualize the game order instantly.
feature3.description2: Less calculations, more flow: the mechanics fade in favor of the adventure.

feature4.title: CODEX - Your adventure grimoire
feature4.description1: Gather, share and enhance your characters and spells.
feature4.description2: Each player and each game master can feed the CODEX to turn it into a truly living library.

features.ready: Ready to set off on an adventure?

content.text: These Terms of Use (ToU) aim to define the terms of access and use of the Chariot application provided by CHARIOT, accessible via the website {a}.
Chariot is an online service dedicated to supporting Game Masters (GMs) in managing Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) campaigns.
The user acknowledges having read these ToU and accepts them without reservation before using the service.
The service offers a freemium version to create, organize, and manage campaigns, as well as paid options with advanced features.
Access to features requires the creation of a user account.
The user agrees to provide accurate information.
The user is responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials.
The user agrees not to:
use the service for illegal purposes or in violation of the ToU,
infringe on the rights of third parties,
disrupt the functioning of the service,
attempt to access restricted areas of the service.
Chariot and its content (design, code, logos, etc.) are the exclusive property of CHARIOT.
Content generated by the user remains their property, but the user grants CHARIOT a limited license to use it in order to operate the service.
The handling of personal data is described in the Privacy Policy.
The user has rights to access, modify, and delete their data.
CHARIOT strives to provide a reliable service but cannot guarantee 100% availability.
The user uses the service at their own risk.
CHARIOT’s liability is limited to cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct.

sections.title: Article 9 - Modification of the service and ToU

content.text: CHARIOT may modify the ToU and the service at any time.
Users will be informed by email or notification.
Continued use constitutes acceptance of the changes.
The user can delete their account at any time.
CHARIOT may suspend or delete an account in case of violation of the ToU.
These ToU are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the competent courts are those of CHARIOT’s registered office.
These General Terms and Conditions of Sale govern the sale of paid services of the Chariot application by CHARIOT.
Paid offers are described on the website.
Prices are indicated in euros including VAT.
Prices may change, and users will be informed before being charged.
Orders are placed via the online form.
Order validation constitutes acceptance of the Terms and Conditions of Sale.
Payment is made online via Stripe.
Accepted payment methods are major credit cards.
Payments are secured.
Subscriptions are automatically renewed unless canceled.
The user may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period.
In accordance with the law, the right of withdrawal does not apply to fully delivered services upon purchase (digital content).
CHARIOT may suspend access in case of non-payment or violation of the Terms of Use.
In case of termination, data may be deleted after a period.
Services are provided “as is.”
CHARIOT’s liability is limited in accordance with the law.
See the Privacy Policy.
French law, courts of CHARIOT’s registered office.
Chariot is committed to protecting users’ personal data.
Identification data,
Connection data,
Data related to service usage.
Account management,
Service delivery,
Marketing (with consent),
Service improvement.
Data is retained for as long as necessary for the intended purpose,
Compliance with legal obligations.
Access, rectification, deletion,
Objection to processing,
Data portability,
Contact for exercising rights.
Technical and organizational measures to protect data.
Limited use,
Consent required.
Email: {e} for any GDPR-related inquiries.
The Chariot website {a} is published by:
Publisher name: CHARIOT
Legal status: In progress
Head office address: 82B Allée de Barcelone, 31000 Toulouse, France
SIREN / SIRET number: In progress

Publishing directors: Elvis PICHOU & Hugo PIEDANNA, future presidents of CHARIOT SAS

Address: 61 Lordou Vironos Street, 6023 Larnaca, Cyprus
Website: https://www.hostinger.com/
Contact email: support@hostinger.com

All content on the Chariot website—including but not limited to text, images, graphics, logos, icons, interfaces, audio and video elements, as well as source code—is protected by intellectual property laws and is the exclusive property of the publisher, unless otherwise stated.
Any reproduction, distribution, modification, adaptation, retransmission, or publication, even partial, is strictly prohibited without prior written consent from the publisher.

The publisher strives to provide the most accurate information possible on the Chariot website. However, it cannot be held responsible for omissions, inaccuracies, or update failures, whether caused by itself or third parties.
The user acknowledges having the skills and resources necessary to access and use this website. They also confirm that their IT setup is virus-free and in proper working condition.
Hyperlinks may redirect to websites other than Chariot. The publisher declines any responsibility for the content of those external sites.
For any information regarding the collection and processing of your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
